name: Calpine Corporation
description: Calpine Corporation is America's largest generator of electricity from natural gas and geothermal resources. Founded in 1984, the company operates a modern, flexible, and efficient fleet of power plants across major competitive markets in the United States and Canada. Calpine is a leader in clean energy, operating the Geysers in California, the world's largest geothermal power facility, and is dedicated to providing reliable, environmentally responsible power to wholesale and retail customers.
